data.description:
Map the local `idea` status to the Jira `IDEA` status across all reconciler status
maps, with a parity test, and document the Jira-side prerequisites.

## Why

For `idea` to sync, the reconciler must translate it to Jira `IDEA` outbound and
back inbound. rebar keeps several hand-maintained status maps that must all agree;
missing one causes a preflight abort or a silent mistranslation. `idea тЖФ IDEA` is a
unique (injective) mapping, so no `rebar-status:` annotation label is needed and no
terminal-set change is required.

## What

- Add `idea тЖТ "IDEA"` to `config.local_to_jira_status`.
- Add `"IDEA" тЖТ idea` to `config.jira_to_local_status`.
- Add `"IDEA" тЖТ idea` to `inbound_differ._JIRA_TO_LOCAL_STATUS` (kept in lock-step
  with the config reverse map by the parity test).
- Add `idea тЖТ "IDEA"` to `jira_fields._LOCAL_STATUS_TO_JIRA`.
- Add `idea тЖТ "IDEA"` to `outbound_fields._LOCAL_TO_JIRA_STATUS`.
- Extend the parity test to assert the `idea тЖФ IDEA` entries.
- Document the operator prerequisite (the Jira workflow must have an `IDEA` status
  with transitions into and out of it) and the create-drops-status convergence
  quirk (a newly-synced idea is born in the Jira default status and converges to
  `IDEA` on a later reconcile pass).

## Scope

- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/config.py` тАФ both direction maps.
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/inbound_differ.py` тАФ `_JIRA_TO_LOCAL_STATUS`.
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/jira_fields.py` тАФ `_LOCAL_STATUS_TO_JIRA`.
- `src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/outbound_fields.py` тАФ `_LOCAL_TO_JIRA_STATUS`.
- `tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/state/test_config.py` тАФ parity assertion.
- The reconciler/Jira doc тАФ prerequisite + convergence-quirk note.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `config.local_to_jira_status["idea"]` equals `"IDEA"`.
- [ ] `config.jira_to_local_status["IDEA"]` equals `"idea"`.
- [ ] `inbound_differ._JIRA_TO_LOCAL_STATUS["IDEA"]` equals `"idea"`.
- [ ] `jira_fields._LOCAL_STATUS_TO_JIRA["idea"]` equals `"IDEA"`.
- [ ] `outbound_fields._LOCAL_TO_JIRA_STATUS["idea"]` equals `"IDEA"`.
- [ ] The parity test asserts `config.jira_to_local_status` matches
      `inbound_differ._JIRA_TO_LOCAL_STATUS` including the `IDEA` entry.
- [ ] An outbound status translation of a local `idea` ticket yields Jira `IDEA`
      (test-verified).
- [ ] An inbound translation of Jira `IDEA` yields local `idea` (test-verified).
- [ ] The status-mapping preflight does not abort on a local `idea` status.
- [ ] The reconciler/Jira doc records the `IDEA` workflow-transition prerequisite
      and the create-drops-status convergence quirk.
- [ ] `make lint` passes for the changed files.
data.title: Map local 'idea' status to Jira IDEA across reconciler maps
